calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2021 Vacated

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Deem Admitted Defendants Requests For Admission, Set One
Off Calendar Sep-21-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GEORGE LAI's Motion To Deem Admitted Defendant's Requests For Admission, Set One.

NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED TO DEFENDANT GEORGE LAI'S MOTION TO HAVE DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE, DEEMED ADMITTED DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT WILL ISSUE THE FOLLOWING ORDER:
(1) PLAINTIFFF WILL SERVE DEFENDANT WITH CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO EACH REQUEST FOR ADMISSION WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.
(2) IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE TERMS OF PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION PREVIOUSLY SENT TO PLAINTIFF WILL BE DEEMED TO BE ADMITTED AND PLAINTIFF WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM OFERRING ANY EVIDENCE WHICH CHALLENGES THE TRUTH OF SAID ADMISSION.
(3) NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WERE SOUGHT AND NONE WILL BE IMPOSED.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling via email to rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Set For Trial On Dec-13-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
